en-US.name: Night Feed Tracker for Parents
en-US.subtitle: Split Nursing Shifts for a Duo
en-US.promotional_text: Newborn keeping you up? Split the night feed shifts between two parents — fair, automatic, and based on your baby's age. Free for one schedule a day. No account required.
en-US.description:
Stop the 3 AM negotiation. Night Feed Tracker splits the night between two parents based on your baby's age, your work schedules, and your wake window — so nobody wakes up resentful.

Every new parent knows the drill: the baby cries, one of you elbows the other, and you trade off without any plan. By week three, somebody is keeping score. By week six, somebody is broken.

HOW IT WORKS

1. Add the baby's weeks old, both parents' work status, and your night window.
2. Tap Generate Schedule.
3. Each parent gets a clear block: who is on from when to when, exactly which feeds they cover, and one handoff midpoint.

The math behind it: AAP and LLLI feeding interval guidance for newborn through 24+ weeks, fair-split logic that balances total feeds AND total awake hours, and an earliest tie-break so handoffs don't fall on awkward times.

Under a minute to set up. No account required. No location, no contacts, no calendar access.

CORE FEATURES

Daily Schedule Card
Two blocks per night, one per parent. Each card shows: block window (e.g., 10 PM to 2 AM), the feeds within it (e.g., 11:30 PM, 12:45 AM, 1:30 AM), and the recommended sleep estimate for that parent. Read it at a glance.

Fair-Split Logic
The app reads who is working tomorrow and who is off, and shifts the heavier block accordingly. If both parents work, it splits evenly. If only one works, the other covers more. Both off, it still splits — somebody has to sleep.

Age-Aware Intervals
The feeding interval the app uses for your baby comes from age-based guidance, not a fixed number. A 2-week-old gets a different schedule than a 16-week-old. The math adjusts automatically.

Free Forever Tier
One schedule a day, full result card, both blocks visible, handoff time. No watermark.

PRO FEATURES
Upgrade to Pro for:
- Event logs: tap each feed in real time to log it, and see how reality compared to the plan
- Weekly patterns: 7-day view of who actually got how many hours of contiguous sleep
- Full history: every night you generated, archived
- Custom notification timing for handoff alerts
- Family settings: save partner names, work schedules, and baby info so generation is one tap

PRIVACY FIRST
- No account, no sign-up, no login
- All data stored locally on your device (Hive)
- Zero network requests for app functionality (no analytics, no tracking, no ads)
- Apple's StoreKit handles the subscription; we never see your payment info

Night Feed Tracker provides scheduling guidance based on general age-appropriate feeding intervals. It is not medical advice. For feeding decisions, consult your pediatrician or lactation consultant.

Terms of Use (EULA):
